title: Project Intern (IoT Systems)
description: Developed and integrated Bluetooth-enabled IoT systems using NodeMCU ESP32 boards. Worked on firmware-level code integration and device communication pipelines. Built foundational embedded systems skills during early undergraduate training before large-scale LLM adoption.

title: AI & ML Summer Intern
description: Trained on image and audio ML pipelines before contributing to a surround-sound IoT demo project. Built secure ML inference workflows integrating MQTT-based communication for IoT devices. Focused on audio feature extraction, model optimization, and secure real-time deployment on constrained hardware environments.

title: AI Research Intern
description: Worked on embedding-based analytics and app-level optimization across diverse client tech stacks including COBOL, Perl, and Objective-C systems. Conducted feasibility studies for LLM and RAG-based integration into legacy architectures. Contributed to product-level improvements through code intelligence and embedding pipelines.
